title: Siemens U273 B6 empirical bridge driven by finite B11/S6/S7 command port
status: VCMD ideal has been replaced by a B11/S6/S7 Thevenin command source for DC and by the same finite source impedance for AC.
scientificBoundary: This is not yet the full active B11/S6/S7 closed loop. The active regulator, transistor output resistance, and exact detector discharge path remain parametric; the model no longer shorts CMD to an ideal voltage source.

s6S7ContactTruthUsed.s6DeliveryLinear: 4/5 closed, 8/9 closed, 5/6 open, 7/8 open; 5->3->1 closed; 2 open.
s6S7ContactTruthUsed.s7DrawnLimiter: 17->18 closed, 19 open; opposite state 17->19 is retained as compressor hypothesis.

scenarios.name: b11_s6_s7_delivery_linear_r3k
scenarios.note: Finite B11/S6/S7 port, delivery-linear S6 contact truth retained as operating context. Rsource=3k is a low-output-impedance bound tied to R1=3k in the visible S6/S7 area; active B11 remains reduced to Thevenin.

scenarios.name: b11_s6_s7_delivery_linear_r10k
scenarios.note: Finite B11/S6/S7 port with moderate output impedance. This is a sensitivity case until the active B11 regulator output resistance is closed.

scenarios.name: b11_s7_detector_r31_51k
scenarios.note: High-impedance detector-side bound using R31=51k as a physically visible series resistance near D2/ZL10/S7.

scenarios.name: b11_s6_s7_high_z_100k
scenarios.note: Upper sensitivity case. It is intentionally not claimed as the real B11 output impedance.
